title: indulgent ukrainian buttery bouncy-qq pilaf
description: a creamy, citrusy pilaf dish from Ukraine, perfect for a comforting meal. Features a delicate balance of flavors and textures from the unwaxed lemon and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: long-grain rice
ingredients.notes: uncooked, preferably day-old rice for better bounciness

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: softened to room temperature for better distribution

ingredients.name: unwaxed lemon
ingredients.notes: juiced and zested for added brightness and depth

ingredients.name: chicken broth
ingredients.notes: macrobiotic-friendly store-bought or homemade broth for added hydration

ingredients.name: fresh dill
ingredients.notes: chopped for garnish and added freshness

ingredients.name: fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: chopped for garnish and added freshness

instructions: preheat oven to 3751 fahrenheit for a crispy crust on top
